headline: We build websites, mobile apps, and digital marketing that turn visitors into real enquiries.
personImageAlt: Designer building websites and digital products

gmbReviews.author: Amit K.
gmbReviews.text: Website ekdum solid hai — fast load, clean design. Leads WhatsApp pe aa rahi hain regularly.

gmbReviews.author: Priya Sharma
gmbReviews.text: SEO ke baad Google pe ranking better hai. Team Zirakpur se, seedhi baat, time pe kaam.

gmbReviews.author: Vikram S.
gmbReviews.text: Ecommerce + payment gateway setup smooth tha. Content delay hua par delivery professional thi.

gmbReviews.author: Neha R.
gmbReviews.text: Logo, social posts, website — sab ek hi jagah. Ab brand thoda premium lagta hai.

gmbReviews.author: Rajesh T.
gmbReviews.text: Creative Web Solutions Zirakpur — local team jo samajh ke kaam karti hai. Small business ke liye best.

title: Technology partner for ambitious businesses
subtitle: Creative Web Solutions combines product thinking, engineering discipline, and marketing expertise. From corporate websites to custom applications, we help teams in Zirakpur, Chandigarh, and Mohali launch faster and operate with confidence.
imageAlt: Creative Web Solutions office — modern workspace for web design and development

features.title: Expert team
features.description: 15+ years delivering websites, apps, and campaigns

features.title: Local support
features.description: Fast replies and clear updates in English and Hindi

features.title: Quality delivery
features.description: Clean code, tested launches, and honest timelines

title: What we do
subtitle: From first wireframe to launch day — one team for design, build, and measurable growth across Punjab.

items.title: Web design
items.desc: Clear, modern layouts for mobile and desktop — so visitors grasp your offer in seconds and know exactly what to do next.

items.title: Website development
items.desc: Fast, secure corporate sites and landing pages with forms, WhatsApp, and analytics wired in from day one — built on clean, maintainable code.

items.title: Mobile apps
items.desc: Android and iOS apps that feel native, with smooth onboarding and the features your customers actually use — plus cross-platform when speed matters.

items.title: Digital marketing
items.desc: Google Ads, Meta campaigns, and landing pages planned around real leads — with simple weekly reports, not vanity metrics.

items.title: Custom software
items.desc: Dashboards, CRM tools, booking systems, and APIs shaped around how your team works — so spreadsheets are not your operating system.

items.title: Brand & graphics
items.desc: Logos, pitch decks, social kits, and campaign creatives that look sharp everywhere — consistent, on-brand, ready to ship.

items.title: Ecommerce
items.desc: Shopify, WooCommerce, or custom stores with smooth checkout, easy admin, and product pages written to turn browsers into buyers.

items.title: SEO & content
items.desc: Technical SEO, service-area pages, and useful content so you show up when people search in Zirakpur, Chandigarh, Mohali, and beyond.

steps.title: Discovery call
steps.description: Goals, timeline, and budget — written summary after the call.

steps.title: Design sign-off
steps.description: Wireframes or UI you approve before we write production code.

steps.title: Build & staging
steps.description: You review on a real URL on phone and desktop.

title: Trusted by local businesses
subtitle: Clear communication and delivery you can plan around.

testimonials.name: B2B supplier, Punjab
testimonials.text: Corporate website + Google Ads landing — enquiries track ho rahi hain.
